form.formComment: Last start surrendered the lead and finished 4th (Fr1) over 1800m after showing early pace at this track was 4th-5.8 at the bell, beaten 11 m by All Da Rage (2:11.00) in No NR on April 4 at $4.40. Before that, 4th (Fr1) over 2230m after showing early speed at this track, at the bell was 2nd-2.6 beaten 12 m by All Da Rage (2:44.10) in No NR on March 11 at $1.75. Draws the pegs again so expect another good effort.

form.formComment: Racing consistently with minor placings at its last two starts. Placed last start was well back in the run when 3rd (Fr5) over 2160m at Victor Harbor, beaten 9 m by Cee Cee Lou (2:38.40) in NR 58 to 69 on April 5 at $36.20. Before that 3rd (Sr4) over 1609m at Gawler, at the bell was 6th-8.6 beaten 2 m by Lochinvar Magic (1:54.50) in NR up to 69 on March 30 at $41. Not as keen on its chances in this line-up.

form.formComment: Racing consistently. Last start on the speed and boxed on steadily; won by a head (Sr2) at Gawler (1:54.50) beating Alora in NR up to 69 on March 30 at $5 at the bell was 2nd-1.2. In form and should feature in the finish again.

form.formComment: Nine-year-old gelding showed improvement last start. 3rd (Fr3) over 1800m after showing early pace at this track, at the bell was 3rd-3.8 beaten 9 m by All Da Rage (2:11.00) in No NR on April 4 at $9. The run before was not as impressive when well beaten into tenth behind Betterzippit at Gawler over 2550m in a NR 70 or better on March 30 at $23. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Solid last start; 5th (Sr1) over 1720m at Melton was 9th-12.37 at the bell, beaten 7 m by Komodo (2:01.00) in NR80 on March 28 at $26. Strong contender.
